title: platystachys patens
intro: Platystachys patens, also known as Thai tea tree or Thai jasmine tea, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its small white flowers and fragrant leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The leaves of Platystachys patens have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
